popularStory.headline: Sir Walter Devereux of Bodenham and Weobley
popularStory.description: Sir Walter Devereux of Bodenham and Weobley was a prominent knight in Herefordshire during the reigns of Richard II and Henry IV. He represented Hereford in Parliament, and gave rise to the Devereux E …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Devereux於1411年出生在英國賀福爾波登哈姆時，他的父親Walter Devereux24歲，母親Elizabeth Maud Bromwich31歲。他於1427年與Elizabeth Merbury結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1429年登記服兵役。他於1447年在英國賀福爾被列為sheriff 。他去世於1459年4月22日在英國享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Devereux于1411年出生在英国賀福爾波登哈姆时，他的父亲Walter Devereux24岁，母亲Elizabeth Maud Bromwich31岁。他于1427年与Elizabeth Merbury结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1429年登记服兵役。他于1447年在英国賀福爾被列为sheriff 。他去世于1459年4月22日在英国享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Devereux was born in 1411, in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England, his father, Walter Devereux, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Maud Bromwich, was 31. He married Elizabeth Merbury in 1427. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1429. In 1447, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as sheriff  in Herefordshire, England. He died on 22 April 1459, in England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Devereux est né en 1411, à Bodenham, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Devereux, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maud Bromwich, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Merbury en 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1429. En 1447, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff  à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1459, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Devereux 1411 in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Devereux 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Maud Bromwich 31. Er hat 1427 Elizabeth Merbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1429 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1447, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff  in Herefordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. April 1459 im Alter von 48 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Devereux è nato il nel 1411 nel Bodenham, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Devereux, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Maud Bromwich, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Merbury nel 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1429. Nel 1447, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff  nel Herefordshire, England. Morì il 22 aprile 1459, nel England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Devereuxが1411年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアボデンハムで生まれた時，父Walter Devereuxは24歳，母Elizabeth Maud Bromwichは31歳であった。1427年にElizabeth Merburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年に兵役登録をした。1447年，36歳の時，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでの職業はsheriff と記録されている。彼は1459年4月22日にイギリスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Devereux(이)가 1411년 영국 허퍼드실르 보데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Devereux(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Maud Bromwich(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1427년 Elizabeth Merbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1447년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 허퍼드실르에서 sheriff 이었다. 그는 1459년 4월 22일 영국에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Devereux nasceu em 1411, em Bodenham, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Devereux, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maud Bromwich, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Merbury em 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1429. Em 1447, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff  em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1459, em Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Devereux родился в 1411 г. в местности боденам, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Devereux было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maud Bromwich, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Merbury в 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1429 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1447 году, в возрасте 36 лет, работал по профессии sheriff  в местности хирефордшир, Англия. Он умер 22 апреля 1459 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

sm.from 1449 to 1451: mai le 1449 e o'o I le 1451

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Devereux nació en 1411, en Bodenham, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Devereux, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Maud Bromwich, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Merbury en 1427. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1429. En 1447, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff  en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 22 de abril de 1459, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
